key_registry.lookup: Resolve by account_id and key_id at counter_signature.signed_at. A key is valid only when valid_from <= signed_at and valid_until, revoked_at, and compromised_at are absent or strictly after signed_at.
key_registry.key_id: lowercase SHA-256 hex digest of canonical raw Ed25519 public key bytes

composition.rule: This claim can be supported only when key.status.completeness.v1 is supported for the exact signer key at the signed slot timestamp.

envelope.timestamp_rule: signed_at is a UTC ISO 8601 timestamp with microsecond precision and a Z suffix.
envelope.payload_type_rule: payload_type MUST equal permit.counter_signature.v1. No other permit v2 signature slot may satisfy this claim.

canonical_payload.execution_intent_hash_profile: execution_intent_hash is the lowercase SHA-256 hex digest of canonical permit.counter_signature.execution_intent.v1 bytes.
canonical_payload.hash_rule: signed_payload_hash is the lowercase SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical signed payload bytes.

temporal_rules.permit_window: counter_signature.signed_at MUST be inside the permit valid_from..valid_until window.
temporal_rules.pre_dispatch_revocation: When the permit is revoked, counter_signature.signed_at MUST be strictly before revocation.effective_at.

verdicts.supported: envelope shape, payload type, payload hash, signer binding, intent binding, signing-time key resolution, permit window, pre-dispatch revocation rule, signature verification, and supported key.status.completeness.v1 are supported.
verdicts.disproved: payload type, payload hash, signer binding, intent binding, permit window, revocation timing, or signature verification fails.
verdicts.insufficient_evidence: slot evidence, permit canonical inputs, account key registry evidence, signer identity, key id, signing timestamp, execution intent, signature material, or key.status.completeness.v1 support is missing.
verdicts.unverifiable_scope: permit format version, canonicalization profile, key-registry profile, timestamp profile, or key-status completeness profile is unsupported.
